thought.text: Okay, the project was successfully created in the `coffee-shop` subdirectory. Now I need to install the dependencies and add Tailwind CSS and Lucide React.

action.command: cd coffee-shop && npm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer && npm install lucide-react && npm install

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"summary":"Install Tailwind CSS, PostCSS, Autoprefixer, Lucide React, and other dependencies.","security_risk":"MEDIUM","command":"cd coffee-shop && npm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer && npm install lucide-react && npm install","timeout":120}

summary: Install Tailwind CSS, PostCSS, Autoprefixer, Lucide React, and other dependencies.
